summary: Tested business logic refactor for Addrika e-commerce platform: 3-tier shipping, coupon MRP calculation, promo banner WELCOME10 removal, registration warnings, and checkout read-only fields. Fixed critical ShoppingCart.jsx bug where getShippingTier was not destructured from useCart hook.

ui_bugs.issue: getShippingTier was not destructured from useCart hook causing 'ReferenceError: getShippingTier is not defined'
ui_bugs.fix_applied: Added getShippingTier to destructured imports from useCart()

shipping_tiers.boundary_tests: Exact boundaries at ₹249 and ₹999 tested and working

promo_banner_welcome10.details: WELCOME10 code NOT displayed in promo banner. Banner only shows shipping tier info.

registration_warnings.email_warning: ⚠️ Email cannot be changed after registration. Used for order updates.
registration_warnings.phone_warning: ⚠️ Phone cannot be changed after registration.

checkout_readonly_fields.details: Email and phone fields have readOnly={hasBillingFromUser || usingSavedDetails} attribute

coupon_mrp_calculation.details: When coupon applied, calculation uses MRP (mrpTotal - codeDiscount), bulk discount set to 0

coupon_bulk_discount_removal.details: hasCouponApplied ? 0 : getBulkDiscount() - bulk discount is 0 when coupon applied

backend_tests.details: Skipped test was HAPPYBDAY validation which requires login

frontend_tests.registration_warnings: PASSED - Both email and phone warnings visible

bug_fixed.root_cause: getShippingTier function was being called but not destructured from useCart hook
bug_fixed.fix: Added getShippingTier to the destructured imports: const { ..., getShippingTier, ... } = useCart();
bug_fixed.verification: Cart now opens without error and displays correct shipping tiers

critical_code_review_comments: Shipping logic correctly implements 3-tier system in both backend (services/shipping_config.py) and frontend (CartContext.jsx, Checkout.jsx)
Coupon calculation from MRP correctly implemented - when coupon applied, uses mrpTotal instead of discounted subtotal
Registration page has clear amber warnings for email/phone immutability
Checkout page has readOnly attribute on email/phone for logged-in users with billing data
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/ShoppingCart.jsx (bug fix - added getShippingTier to useCart destructure)

test_credentials.note: These are admin credentials, not regular user login

seed_data_creation: None - used existing products and discount codes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Business logic refactor verified. Fixed critical ShoppingCart.jsx bug. Shipping tiers work: <₹249=₹149, ₹249-998=₹49, ≥₹999=FREE. Coupon calculation from MRP verified in code. Registration warnings for email/phone immutability are present. Checkout requires login - cannot test with guest checkout.
verification_screenshots: .screenshots/cart_fixed.png - Shows cart with ₹149 shipping for small order
.screenshots/cart_tier2.png - Shows cart with ₹49 shipping for medium order
